title: French Eggplant Fritters
description: Crispy French eggplant fritters made with eggplant, citrus, and a hint of Russian spices.
instructions: 1. Peel and finely chop the eggplant.
2. In a bowl, mix together the flour, breadcrumbs, citrus zest, and Russian spice blend.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and mix in the milk.
4. Add the chopped eggplant to the egg mixture and mix well.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the eggplant mixture and mix until just combined.
6. Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
7. Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the eggplant mixture into the pan.
8. Flatten the mixture slightly with a spatula.
9. Cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
10. Drain on paper towels and coat with crispy fritter coating.
